manifest_claim: With only the two end stones pinned, FBF and Kamino preserve the 23-stone dynamic arch through crown impact while MuJoCo slumps before impact and collapses afterward.
remaining_blockers: The current-source literal-wedge bundle has no projectile and therefore does not reproduce crown impact.
The author scene, projectile parameters, paper camera/timeline, approved golden and diff, and faithful Kamino and MuJoCo baselines are unavailable.

claims.claim: With only the two end stones pinned, FBF and Kamino preserve the 23-stone dynamic arch through crown impact while MuJoCo slumps before impact and collapses afterward.
claims.support: The bundle supports only the pre-impact DART clause: exactly two springers are pinned, all 23 interior literal wedges are dynamic, and the reconstructed arch remains standing for 600 fallback-free exact steps. It does not support the impact or external-solver clauses.
